name: canva-linux
description: A community open-source desktop wrapper for use with Canva
author: Community

scripts.dist:appimage: npm run build:runtime && NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation electron-builder --linux AppImage --publish=never
scripts.build:scripts: esbuild scripts/build-runtime.ts scripts/build-preload-bundle.ts scripts/copy-runtime-assets.ts scripts/clean-runtime-build.ts scripts/electron-builder-before-build.ts scripts/run-node-tests.ts scripts/run-tui.ts scripts/run-typescript-script.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --external:electron --external:blessed --external:esbuild --external:typescript --outdir=.build/scripts --entry-names=[name]
scripts.test: CANVA_SCRIPT_REPO_ROOT=$PWD npm run build:scripts && CANVA_SCRIPT_REPO_ROOT=$PWD node .build/scripts/run-node-tests.js
scripts.build:preload: CANVA_SCRIPT_REPO_ROOT=$PWD npm run build:scripts && CANVA_SCRIPT_REPO_ROOT=$PWD node .build/scripts/build-preload-bundle.js
scripts.clean:runtime: CANVA_SCRIPT_REPO_ROOT=$PWD npm run build:scripts && CANVA_SCRIPT_REPO_ROOT=$PWD node .build/scripts/clean-runtime-build.js
scripts.build:runtime: CANVA_SCRIPT_REPO_ROOT=$PWD npm run build:scripts && CANVA_SCRIPT_REPO_ROOT=$PWD node .build/scripts/build-runtime.js
scripts.build:scripts-core: esbuild scripts/core/action-registry.ts scripts/core/action-runner.ts scripts/core/validate-actions.ts scripts/core/overview-status.ts scripts/core/check-ai-guardrails.ts scripts/core/check-no-shell-menu.ts scripts/core/check-sudo-contract.ts scripts/core/check-action-contract.ts scripts/core/check-detection-contract.ts scripts/core/check-version-consistency.ts scripts/core/check-review-checklist.ts scripts/core/check-shell-action-ids.ts scripts/core/check-doc-links.ts scripts/core/check-dependency-policy.ts scripts/core/check-runtime-build.ts scripts/core/check-typescript-wrapper-contract.ts scripts/core/check-typescript-first.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outdir=.build/scripts/core
scripts.check:scripts-core: npm run build:scripts-core && node .build/scripts/core/validate-actions.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-no-shell-menu.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-sudo-contract.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-action-contract.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-detection-contract.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-version-consistency.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-review-checklist.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-shell-action-ids.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-doc-links.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-dependency-policy.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-runtime-build.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-typescript-wrapper-contract.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-typescript-first.js
scripts.tui: CANVA_SCRIPT_REPO_ROOT=$PWD npm run build:scripts && CANVA_SCRIPT_REPO_ROOT=$PWD node .build/scripts/run-tui.js
scripts.check:tui: CANVA_SCRIPT_REPO_ROOT=$PWD npm run build:scripts && CANVA_SCRIPT_REPO_ROOT=$PWD node .build/scripts/run-tui.js --help
